title: AWS Free Tier
description: Experiment with 100+ AWS services at no cost. Includes 12 months of free usage plus always-free offers.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
description: Free 6-hour foundational course on AWS Skill Builder covering core cloud concepts, services, and pricing.

title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
description: Entry-level AWS certification validating your understanding of the cloud. Great first cert for students.

title: AWS Workshops
description: Free hands-on labs and workshops built by AWS teams. Learn by building real things in the console.

title: AWS Skill Builder
description: Official AWS online learning center with 600+ free digital courses across all skill levels.

title: AWS Educate
description: Free program for students and educators with cloud learning content and AWS credits — no credit card needed.
